commit_message: Added SPI spi slave function the ability to manage an SPI communication aborted Added SPI spi slave function the ability to manage an SPI communication aborted Added SPI spi slave function the ability to manage an SPI communication aborted (ss_n='1'); added general_error_severity to the t_spi_bfm_config (this feature can be useful to change the error severity from the TB procedure)
